description: Sector overlay for software platforms, SaaS, digital services, cybersecurity, electronic transactions, data protection, cloud, and internet-service documentation in Togo.

metadata.scope: Togo-only sector overlay controls for Technology. Intended to be used with togo_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from Togolese and applicable regional legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Law No. 2018-026 on cybersecurity and the fight against cybercrime / ANCy materials
primary_sources.issuer: Agence Nationale de la Cybersécurité / Togolese Republic

primary_sources.name: Decree No. 2018-062/PR on electronic transactions and services in Togo
Togo personal data protection law materials
primary_sources.issuer: Togolese Republic / Personal Data Protection Authority

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Togolese laws, regional WAEMU/OHADA/CIMA instruments, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.
Automated results are screening signals only and require qualified human legal/compliance review.

rules.title: Privacy notice, personal-data processing, or data-subject rights evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, personal data, consent, lawful basis, rights, or controller/processor evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Togo personal data protection law materials

rules.title: Cybersecurity governance or incident-response evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for cybersecurity policy, incident response, access control, vulnerability management, ANCy/CERT routing, or security operations evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Togolese legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law status, and legal sufficiency before relying on the automated result.
source_basis: Law No. 2018-026 on cybersecurity and the fight against cybercrime / ANCy materials

rules.title: Electronic transaction, digital-service, or trust-service evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for electronic transaction, digital contract, e-signature, electronic service, certificate, or trust-service evidence.

rules.summary: Checks for terms of service, acceptable use, complaints, content moderation, user support, or consumer disclosure evidence.

rules.title: Third-party, cloud, hosting, or data-processing controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for processor contract, hosting, cloud, subcontractor, cross-border transfer, or security obligations evidence.
